nasb.text: For he clung to the Lord; he did not depart from following Him, but kept His commandments, which the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: For he held fast to the Lord. He did not depart from following him, but kept the commandments that the Lord commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 他忠於耶和華，沒有轉離不跟從他，謹守他的吩咐，就是他曾吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 他对耶和华忠心不渝，遵守耶和华颁给摩西的诫命。
